license: World of ClaudeCraft original art (project-owned) unless an entry carries its own "license" field, which overrides this file-level default.
note: Profession and gathering skill icons (Professions 2.0). Ids follow docs/professions-2/asset-manifest.json (prof_<craftId>, gather_<skill>). WebP only; add art with `npm run assets:professions`, then wire each basename into PROFESSION_IMAGE_IDS (src/ui/icons.ts) and add its provenance entry here ({ "id", "name", "source", optional "license" }). The set ships empty: every id renders via its procedural recipe until painted art lands.
